reviews.comment: We have worked with James a few times on AWS related consulting regarding Networking, EC2s, Infrastructure as Code, and general AWS architecture. He has been an excellent resource for consulting us on DevOps, SRE, and AWS Cloud Architecture.

Working with Jay was like enjoying a corona on the beach with a lime while reading a good science fiction book. I'm closing out this contract just to clean up our account but I would love to work with him again.

James has excellent work ethic, communication and tenacity. We worked on a project that had many challenging scale requirements. James kept us informed of challenges but was still well within budget. Looking forward to hiring him again for the project!
